published.text:
### Hero
Heading: Utility Bill Collection Automation for Solar Companies
Body: In solar sales, speed is everything. But the process often hits a wall at the utility bill. Chasing homeowners for a PDF or photo of their bill wastes days of sales time and kills momentum. AI automation turns this friction point into a seamless background process, handling the reminders and document intake so your team can focus on the proposal.
Sub: Stop acting like a document collector. Automate the bill-chasing cycle and get your solar quotes out faster.

### Core sections
- How utility bill automation works
- Manual vs. Automated Bill Collection
- When to automate your document intake
- Implementation Checklist
- Related Proof Points

### FAQ
Subhead: Answers for solar teams looking to speed up their sales cycle
Topics: secure upload links, photo vs PDF uploads, reminder-message customization, and JobNimbus / GoHighLevel integration.

### Final CTA
Heading: Stop chasing bills. Start building proposals.
Body: Ready to automate your solar document collection? Book a 30-minute call to map out your intake workflow.
Sub: Practical advice. No sales pressure. Just better operations.

edits.description: Shipped as a focused solar workflow child page under the broader AI automation for solar companies page.
Keeps the copy tightly on utility-bill intake, upload reminders, verification, CRM attachment, and proposal handoff rather than generic solar lead follow-up.
Uses adjacent document-collection and CRM automation proof points honestly without claiming a direct solar utility-bill case study.
Tone stays practical and operator-focused: faster proposals, fewer manual chases, cleaner handoff to design, and clear fit / not-fit criteria.
